checkConsolidationStatus(address,address.notice: This function checks the Consolidation status between 2 addresses

retrieveActiveDelegators(address,address.notice: Returns an array of all active delegators on a certain date for a specific use case on a specific NFT collection given a delegation Address

retrieveDelegationAddresses(address,addr.notice: Returns an array of all delegation addresses (active AND inactive) assigned by a delegator for a specific use case on a specific NFT collection

retrieveDelegators(address,address,uint2.notice: Returns an array of all delegators (active AND inactive) that delegated to a delegationAddress for a specific use case on a specific NFT collection

retrieveGlobalStatusOfDelegation(address.notice: Returns the status of a delegation given the delegator address as well as the delegation address

retrieveMostRecentDelegation(address,add.notice: Returns the most recent delegation address delegated for a specific use case on a specific NFT collection

retrieveMostRecentDelegator(address,addr.notice: Returns the most recent delegator for a specific use case on a specific NFT collection given a delegation Address

retrieveStatusOfActiveDelegator(address,.notice: Checks the status of an active delegator for a delegation Address

retrieveStatusOfMostRecentDelegation(add.notice: Checks if the delegation address performing actions is the most recent delegated by the specific delegator

retrieveSubDelegationStatus(address,addr.notice: Checks if a delegator granted subdelegation status to an Address

retrieveTokenStatus(address,address,addr.notice: Returns the status of a delegation given the delegator address, the collection address, the delegation address as well as a specific token id
